attributes.action: Change For children with Special Educational Needs.
attributes.additional_details: Health Visitors should be trained and empowered to carry out early screenings and refer directly for further assessment, reducing back‑and‑forth between agencies. A single, unified digital pathway is needed so professionals can work together efficiently. More funding must go into educational psychologists, speech and language therapists, and inclusive school spaces. Every child deserves timely support and a calm, sensory‑friendly environment to thrive.
attributes.background: The current system for assessing children’s needs is overly complex and fragmented, causing long delays and leaving many children without help.

rejection.details:
You may wish to sign this petition which calls for a similar action: 
Require developmental assessments for children before starting school https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/763246
